best_match.name: Crew Cut
best_match.reason: The Crew Cut is easy to maintain, complements a round face, and enhances a youthful look.

good_options.name: Ivy League
good_options.reason: The Ivy League provides a neat appearance and is versatile for a round face.

good_options.name: Textured Crop
good_options.reason: The Textured Crop adds volume and texture that suits a round face shape.

good_options.name: Side Part
good_options.reason: The Side Part creates an illusion of an elongated face, balancing a round face shape.

not_recommended.name: Buzz Cut
not_recommended.reason: A Buzz Cut may accentuate roundness rather than elongating the face.

not_recommended.name: Bowl Cut
not_recommended.reason: The Bowl Cut mimics the roundness of the face, offering little contrast.

not_recommended.name: Mullet
not_recommended.reason: A Mullet may not balance well with the natural face shape and hair texture.

analysis.parting_recommendation: A side part will add dimension and shape to a round face.
analysis.fringe_recommendation: Avoid heavy fringe; opt for light, side-swept options instead.

length_options.short_verdict: Highly recommended for easy maintenance and enhancing features.
length_options.medium_verdict: Works well but requires more styling to maintain shape.
length_options.long_verdict: Less recommended as it may overshadow the face's natural round shape.

avoid.name: Warm Blonde
avoid.reason: May clash with overall cool undertones.

avoid.name: Copper Red
avoid.reason: Too bold against a light skin tone.

analysis.summary: The Crew Cut is ideal given its ease of maintenance and fit for a round face shape with a friendly, youthful vibe. Consider a mid fade for added style.
care_tips: Use a light hold styling product for texture.
Regular trims every 4-6 weeks to maintain shape.
Moisturize scalp to prevent dryness, especially in cooler weather.
